{% from "_macros.html" import kpi_card, metric_badge, empty_state %}
<div id="tab-data-quality" class="tab-content">
  <h3 style="font-size: 0.9rem; margin-bottom: 12px;">Data Quality Report</h3>

  {% if has_data_quality %}
  <!-- Overall Status -->
  <div class="grid-4" style="margin-bottom: 16px;">
    {{ kpi_card("Overall Status",
                "PASS" if data_quality.overall_status == "pass" else "WARNING" if data_quality.overall_status == "warn" else "FAIL",
                css_class="positive" if data_quality.overall_status == "pass" else "negative" if data_quality.overall_status == "fail" else "",
                border_color="#3fb950" if data_quality.overall_status == "pass" else "#f85149" if data_quality.overall_status == "fail" else "#d29922") }}
    {{ kpi_card("Checks Passed", data_quality.n_pass, css_class="positive") }}
    {{ kpi_card("Warnings", data_quality.n_warn, border_color="#d29922") }}
    {{ kpi_card("Failures", data_quality.n_fail, css_class="negative" if data_quality.n_fail > 0 else "", border_color="#f85149" if data_quality.n_fail > 0 else "") }}
  </div>

  <!-- Individual Checks -->
  <div class="card" style="margin-bottom: 16px;">
    <h3 style="font-size: 0.85rem; margin-bottom: 8px;">Quality Checks</h3>
    <table>
      <thead>
        <tr><th>Check</th><th>Status</th><th style="text-align:right;">Value</th><th>Detail</th></tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        {% for check in data_quality.checks %}
        <tr>
          <td>{{ check.name }}</td>
          <td>
            {% if check.status == "pass" %}
            {{ metric_badge("PASS", severity="success") }}
            {% elif check.status == "warn" %}
            {{ metric_badge("WARN", severity="high") }}
            {% else %}
            {{ metric_badge("FAIL", severity="critical") }}
            {% endif %}
          </td>
          <td style="text-align:right;">{{ check.value }}</td>
          <td style="font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--text-secondary);">{{ check.detail }}</td>
        </tr>
        {% endfor %}
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- Field Coverage -->
  {% if data_quality.coverage %}
  <div class="card">
    <h3 style="font-size: 0.85rem; margin-bottom: 8px;">Field Coverage (% non-null)</h3>
    {% for field_name, pct in data_quality.coverage.items() %}

      <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 0.8rem; margin-bottom: 3px;">
        <span>{{ field_name }}</span>
        <span>{{ "%.1f"|format(pct) }}%</span>
      </div>
      <div style="background: var(--bg-tertiary); border-radius: 4px; height: 8px; overflow: hidden;">
        <div style="height: 100%; width: {{ [pct, 100] | min }}%; background: {{ '#3fb950' if pct >= 95 else '#d29922' if pct >= 80 else '#f85149' }}; border-radius: 4px; transition: width 0.3s;"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    {% endfor %}
  </div>
  {% endif %}

  {% else %}
  {{ empty_state("No data quality report available.", "Run the pipeline with deal data to generate quality checks.") }}
  {% endif %}
</div>

<div id="tab-deal-explorer" class="tab-content">
  <h3 style="font-size: 0.9rem; margin-bottom: 12px;">Deal Explorer</h3>

  {% if has_deal_explorer %}
  <!-- Summary Stats -->

    </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Filters -->
  <div class="card">
    <div class="controls" style="margin-bottom: 8px;">

        style="background: var(--bg-tertiary); border: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--text-primary); padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.8rem; width: 250px;">
      <select id="deal-filter-ccy" class="ctrl-btn" style="appearance: auto;">
        <option value="">All CCY</option>
        {% for ccy in deal_explorer.by_currency.keys() %}
        <option value="{{ ccy }}">{{ ccy }}</option>
        {% endfor %}
      </select>

        <option value="">All Products</option>
        {% for prod in deal_explorer.by_product.keys() %}
        <option value="{{ prod }}">{{ prod }}</option>
        {% endfor %}
      </select>
      <select id="deal-filter-sign" class="ctrl-btn" style="appearance: auto;">
        <option value="">All P&amp;L</option>
        <option value="positive">Positive only</option>
        <option value="negative">Negative only</option>
      </select>
    </div>

    <h4 style="font-size: 0.85rem; margin-bottom: 8px;">Deal Detail (Top 200 by |P&amp;L|)</h4>
    <div style="overflow-x: auto; max-height: 600px; overflow-y: auto;">
    <table id="deal-explorer-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th style="cursor:pointer;" onclick="sortDealTable(0)">Deal ID</th>
          <th style="cursor:pointer;" onclick="sortDealTable(1)">Counterparty</th>
          <th style="cursor:pointer;" onclick="sortDealTable(2)">CCY</th>
          <th style="cursor:pointer;" onclick="sortDealTable(3)">Product</th>
          <th style="cursor:pointer;" onclick="sortDealTable(4)">Dir</th>
          <th style="cursor:pointer;" onclick="sortDealTable(5)">P&amp;L &#x25B2;&#x25BC;</th>
          <th style="cursor:pointer;" onclick="sortDealTable(6)">Nominal</th>
          <th style="cursor:pointer;" onclick="sortDealTable(7)">OIS %</th>
          <th style="cursor:pointer;" onclick="sortDealTable(8)">RateRef %</th>
          <th style="cursor:pointer;" onclick="sortDealTable(9)">Spread (bps)</th>
          <th style="cursor:pointer;" onclick="sortDealTable(10)">Maturity</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
      {% for d in deal_explorer.deals %}
        <tr data-ccy="{{ d.currency }}" data-product="{{ d.product }}" data-pnl="{{ d.pnl }}">
          <td>{{ d.deal_id }}</td>
          <td>{{ d.counterparty }}</td>
          <td>{{ d.currency }}</td>
          <td>{{ d.product }}</td>
          <td>{{ d.direction }}</td>
          <td style="text-align:right;" class="{{ 'positive' if d.pnl > 0 else 'negative' if d.pnl < 0 else '' }}">{{ "{:,.0f}".format(d.pnl) }}</td>
          <td style="text-align:right;">{{ "{:,.0f}".format(d.nominal) }}</td>
          <td style="text-align:right;">{{ "%.4f"|format(d.ois) }}</td>
          <td style="text-align:right;">{{ "%.4f"|format(d.rate_ref) }}</td>
          <td style="text-align:right;" class="{{ 'positive' if d.spread_bps > 0 else 'negative' if d.spread_bps < 0 else '' }}">{{ "{:+.1f}".format(d.spread_bps) }}</td>
          <td>{{ d.maturity }}</td>

  <script>
  (function() {
    const data = {{ deal_explorer | tojson_safe }};

    // P&L Histogram
    if (typeof Chart !== 'undefined' && data.histogram && data.histogram.bins && data.histogram.bins.length) {
      new Chart(document.getElementById('chart-deal-histogram'), {
        type: 'bar',
        data: {
          labels: data.histogram.bins.map(b => fmt(b)),
          datasets: [{
            label: 'Deal Count',
            data: data.histogram.counts,
            backgroundColor: data.histogram.bins.map(b => b >= 0 ? 'rgba(63,185,80,0.7)' : 'rgba(248,81,73,0.7)'),
            borderWidth: 0,
            barPercentage: 1.0,
            categoryPercentage: 1.0,
          }]
        },
        options: {
          responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
          plugins: { legend: { display: false } },
          scales: {
            x: { ticks: { color: '#8b949e', maxTicksLimit: 10 }, title: { display: true, text: 'P&L', color: '#8b949e' } },
            y: { ticks: { color: '#8b949e' }, title: { display: true, text: 'Deals', color: '#8b949e' } }
          }
        }
      });
    }

    // Maturity Profile
    if (typeof Chart !== 'undefined' && data.maturity_profile && data.maturity_profile.labels && data.maturity_profile.labels.length) {
      new Chart(document.getElementById('chart-deal-maturity'), {
        type: 'bar',
        data: {
          labels: data.maturity_profile.labels,
          datasets: [{
            label: 'Maturing Volume',
            data: data.maturity_profile.volumes,
            backgroundColor: 'rgba(88,166,255,0.7)',
            yAxisID: 'y',
          }, {
            label: 'Deal Count',
            data: data.maturity_profile.counts,
            type: 'line',
            borderColor: '#d29922',
            backgroundColor: 'transparent',
            yAxisID: 'y1',
            pointRadius: 3,
          }]
        },
        options: {
          responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
          plugins: { legend: { labels: { color: '#e6edf3', font: { size: 11 } } } },
          scales: {
            x: { ticks: { color: '#8b949e', maxRotation: 45 } },
            y: { position: 'left', ticks: { color: '#8b949e' }, title: { display: true, text: 'Volume', color: '#8b949e' } },
            y1: { position: 'right', grid: { drawOnChartArea: false }, ticks: { color: '#8b949e' }, title: { display: true, text: 'Count', color: '#8b949e' } }
          }
        }
      });
    }

    // Product donut
    if (typeof Chart !== 'undefined' && data.by_product) {
      const prods = Object.keys(data.by_product);
      new Chart(document.getElementById('chart-deal-product'), {
        type: 'doughnut',
        data: {
          labels: prods,
          datasets: [{ data: prods.map(p => Math.abs(data.by_product[p].pnl)), backgroundColor: prods.map(p => data.by_product[p].color), borderColor: '#0d1117', borderWidth: 2 }]
        },
        options: { responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false, plugins: { legend: { position: 'right', labels: { color: '#e6edf3', font: { size: 11 } } } } }
      });
    }

    // Currency donut
    if (typeof Chart !== 'undefined' && data.by_currency) {
      const ccys = Object.keys(data.by_currency);
      new Chart(document.getElementById('chart-deal-currency'), {
        type: 'doughnut',
        data: {
          labels: ccys,
          datasets: [{ data: ccys.map(c => Math.abs(data.by_currency[c].pnl)), backgroundColor: ccys.map(c => data.by_currency[c].color), borderColor: '#0d1117', borderWidth: 2 }]
        },
        options: { responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false, plugins: { legend: { position: 'right', labels: { color: '#e6edf3', font: { size: 11 } } } } }
      });
    }

    // Table filtering
    const searchEl = document.getElementById('deal-filter-search');
    const ccyEl = document.getElementById('deal-filter-ccy');
    const prodEl = document.getElementById('deal-filter-product');
    const signEl = document.getElementById('deal-filter-sign');
    const table = document.getElementById('deal-explorer-table');

    function filterTable() {
      const search = (searchEl.value || '').toLowerCase();
      const ccy = ccyEl.value;
      const prod = prodEl.value;
      const sign = signEl.value;
      table.querySelectorAll('tbody tr').forEach(function(row) {
        const text = row.textContent.toLowerCase();
        const rCcy = row.dataset.ccy;
        const rProd = row.dataset.product;
        const rPnl = parseFloat(row.dataset.pnl || 0);
        let show = true;
        if (search && text.indexOf(search) === -1) show = false;
        if (ccy && rCcy !== ccy) show = false;
        if (prod && rProd !== prod) show = false;
        if (sign === 'positive' && rPnl <= 0) show = false;
        if (sign === 'negative' && rPnl > 0) show = false;
        row.style.display = show ? '' : 'none';
      });
    }
    if (searchEl) searchEl.addEventListener('input', filterTable);
    if (ccyEl) ccyEl.addEventListener('change', filterTable);
    if (prodEl) prodEl.addEventListener('change', filterTable);
    if (signEl) signEl.addEventListener('change', filterTable);
  })();

  // Column sorting
  var dealSortDir = {};
  function sortDealTable(colIdx) {
    var table = document.getElementById('deal-explorer-table');
    var rows = Array.from(table.querySelectorAll('tbody tr'));
    var dir = dealSortDir[colIdx] === 'asc' ? 'desc' : 'asc';
    dealSortDir[colIdx] = dir;
    rows.sort(function(a, b) {
      var av = a.cells[colIdx].textContent.replace(/[,\s+]/g, '');
      var bv = b.cells[colIdx].textContent.replace(/[,\s+]/g, '');
      var an = parseFloat(av), bn = parseFloat(bv);
      if (!isNaN(an) && !isNaN(bn)) return dir === 'asc' ? an - bn : bn - an;
      return dir === 'asc' ? av.localeCompare(bv) : bv.localeCompare(av);
    });
    var tbody = table.querySelector('tbody');
    rows.forEach(function(r) { tbody.appendChild(r); });
  }
  </script>

  {% else %}
  <div style="text-align: center; padding: 60px; color: var(--text-secondary);">
    <p>No deal-level data available.</p>
    <p style="font-size: 0.85rem;">Provide pnl_by_deal from the P&amp;L engine to enable the Deal Explorer.</p>
  </div>
  {% endif %}
</div>

          {% set modeled = deposit_behavior.beta_analysis.by_currency[ccy].avg_beta %}

          <div class="sub {{ 'positive' if (beta - modeled)|abs < 0.1 else 'negative' }}">
            vs modeled {{ "%.3f"|format(modeled) }}

          </div>

        </tr>
      {% endfor %}
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>
  {% endif %}

  <p class="footnote">
    Deposit Beta = rate passthrough from OIS to deposit rates (0 = fully sticky, 1 = full passthrough).
    Implied Beta = current avg deposit rate / OIS. Compare with modeled NMD beta for model risk assessment.
  </p>

  <script>
  (function() {
    const data = {{ deposit_behavior | tojson_safe }};

    // Currency donut
    if (typeof Chart !== 'undefined' && data.volume_by_ccy) {
      const ccys = Object.keys(data.volume_by_ccy);

          }
        });

    }

    // Product donut
    if (typeof Chart !== 'undefined' && data.volume_by_product) {
      const prods = Object.keys(data.volume_by_product);
      if (prods.length) {
        new Chart(document.getElementById('chart-dep-product'), {
          type: 'doughnut',
          data: {
            labels: prods,
            datasets: [{
              data: prods.map(p => data.volume_by_product[p].volume),
              backgroundColor: prods.map(p => data.volume_by_product[p].color),
              borderColor: '#0d1117', borderWidth: 2,
            }]
          },
          options: {
            responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
            plugins: { legend: { position: 'right', labels: { color: '#e6edf3', font: { size: 11 } } } }
          }
        });
      }
    }
  })();
  </script>

  <!-- NMD Beta Sensitivity (enrichment from pnl_engine) -->
  {% if deposit_behavior.beta_sensitivity is defined and deposit_behavior.beta_sensitivity.has_data %}
  <div class="card" style="margin-bottom: 16px; border-left: 3px solid var(--accent-yellow);">
    <h4 style="font-size: 0.85rem; margin-bottom: 8px;">Beta Sensitivity Analysis (&pm;0.1 perturbation)</h4>
    <table>
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>Currency</th>
          <th style="text-align:right;">Base NII</th>
          <th style="text-align:right;">Beta &minus;0.1</th>
          <th style="text-align:right;">&Delta; NII</th>
          <th style="text-align:right;">Beta +0.1</th>
          <th style="text-align:right;">&Delta; NII</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
      {% for ccy, row in deposit_behavior.beta_sensitivity.by_currency.items() %}
        <tr>
          <td>{{ ccy }}</td>
          <td style="text-align:right;">{{ "{:,.0f}".format(row.base_nii) }}</td>
          <td style="text-align:right;">{{ "{:,.0f}".format(row.beta_down_nii) }}</td>
          <td style="text-align:right;" class="{{ 'positive' if row.delta_down > 0 else 'negative' }}">{{ "{:+,.0f}".format(row.delta_down) }}</td>
          <td style="text-align:right;">{{ "{:,.0f}".format(row.beta_up_nii) }}</td>
          <td style="text-align:right;" class="{{ 'positive' if row.delta_up > 0 else 'negative' }}">{{ "{:+,.0f}".format(row.delta_up) }}</td>
        </tr>
      {% endfor %}
      </tbody>
    </table>
    <p class="footnote">Impact of ±0.1 change in deposit beta on NII. Higher beta = faster rate passthrough = lower NII in rising rate environments.</p>
  </div>
  {% endif %}

  {% else %}
  <div style="text-align: center; padding: 60px; color: var(--text-secondary);">
    <p>No deposit data available.</p>
    <p style="font-size: 0.85rem;">Provide deals with Direction=D/S to enable deposit behavior analysis.</p>
  </div>
  {% endif %}
</div>

    {{ kpi_card("&Delta;EVE (Parallel Down)", "{:,.0f}".format(eve.convexity.delta_eve_down),

    {{ kpi_card("Effective Duration", "%.2f"|format(eve.convexity.effective_duration) ~ "Y") }}
    {{ kpi_card("Convexity (&gamma;)", "%.2f"|format(eve.convexity.convexity)) }}
  </div>
  {% if eve.convexity.by_currency %}
  <table>
    <thead>
      <tr>
        <th>Currency</th>
        <th>EVE</th>
        <th>&Delta;EVE Up</th>
        <th>&Delta;EVE Down</th>
        <th>Eff. Duration</th>
        <th>Convexity</th>
      </tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      {% for c in eve.convexity.by_currency %}
      <tr>
        <td><span style="color: {{ c.color }};">&block;</span> {{ c.currency }}</td>
        <td>{{ "{:,.0f}".format(c.eve) }}</td>
        <td class="{{ 'positive' if c.delta_eve_up > 0 else 'negative' }}">{{ "{:,.0f}".format(c.delta_eve_up) }}</td>
        <td class="{{ 'positive' if c.delta_eve_down > 0 else 'negative' }}">{{ "{:,.0f}".format(c.delta_eve_down) }}</td>
        <td>{{ "%.2f"|format(c.effective_duration) }}Y</td>
        <td>{{ "%.2f"|format(c.convexity) }}</td>
      </tr>
      {% endfor %}
    </tbody>
  </table>
  {% endif %}
  <p class="footnote" style="margin-top: 8px; color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.75rem;">
    Duration = &minus;(&Delta;EVE<sub>up</sub> &minus; &Delta;EVE<sub>down</sub>) / (2 &times; EVE &times; &Delta;r).
    Convexity = (&Delta;EVE<sub>up</sub> + &Delta;EVE<sub>down</sub>) / (EVE &times; &Delta;r&sup2;).
    Positive convexity benefits from large rate moves.
  </p>
</div>
{% endif %}

  (function() {
    const data = {{ fixed_float | tojson_safe }};

    // Overall donut
    if (typeof Chart !== 'undefined' && data.mix) {
      new Chart(document.getElementById('chart-ff-overall'), {
        type: 'doughnut',
        data: {
          labels: ['Fixed', 'Floating'],
          datasets: [{
            data: [data.mix.Fixed.nominal, data.mix.Floating.nominal],
            backgroundColor: ['rgba(88,166,255,0.8)', 'rgba(63,185,80,0.8)'],
            borderColor: '#0d1117', borderWidth: 2,
          }]
        },
        options: {
          responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
          plugins: {
            legend: { position: 'bottom', labels: { color: '#e6edf3', font: { size: 12 } } },
            tooltip: { callbacks: { label: function(ctx) { return ctx.label + ': ' + fmt(ctx.raw) + ' (' + (ctx.dataIndex === 0 ? data.mix.Fixed.pct : data.mix.Floating.pct) + '%)'; } } }
          }
        }
      });
    }

    // Currency stacked bar
    if (typeof Chart !== 'undefined' && data.by_currency) {
      const ccys = Object.keys(data.by_currency);
      new Chart(document.getElementById('chart-ff-currency'), {
        type: 'bar',
        data: {
          labels: ccys,
          datasets: [
            { label: 'Fixed', data: ccys.map(c => data.by_currency[c].fixed), backgroundColor: 'rgba(88,166,255,0.8)', stack: 's' },
            { label: 'Floating', data: ccys.map(c => data.by_currency[c].floating), backgroundColor: 'rgba(63,185,80,0.8)', stack: 's' },
          ]
        },
        options: {
          responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
          plugins: { legend: { labels: { color: '#e6edf3', font: { size: 11 } } } },
          scales: {
            x: { stacked: true, ticks: { color: '#8b949e' } },
            y: { stacked: true, ticks: { color: '#8b949e' } }
          }
        }
      });
    }
  })();
  </script>

    <div class="kpi-card">
      <div class="label">Latest Forecast</div>
      <div class="value">{{ "{:,.0f}".format(forecast_tracking.stats.latest) }}</div>
      <div class="sub">{{ forecast_tracking.stats.n_snapshots }} snapshots</div>
    </div>
    <div class="kpi-card">
      <div class="label">Drift (First &rarr; Last)</div>
      <div class="value {{ 'positive' if forecast_tracking.stats.range_pct >= 0 else 'negative' }}">{{ "{:+.2f}".format(forecast_tracking.stats.range_pct) }}%</div>
      <div class="sub">from {{ "{:,.0f}".format(forecast_tracking.stats.earliest) }}</div>
    </div>
    <div class="kpi-card">
      <div class="label">Revision Volatility</div>
      <div class="value">{{ "{:,.0f}".format(forecast_tracking.stats.volatility) }}</div>
      <div class="sub">CV: {{ "%.2f"|format(forecast_tracking.stats.stability_cv) }}%</div>
    </div>
    <div class="kpi-card">
      <div class="label">Max Single Revision</div>
      <div class="value {{ 'positive' if forecast_tracking.stats.max_revision >= 0 else 'negative' }}">{{ "{:+,.0f}".format(forecast_tracking.stats.max_revision) }}</div>
      <div class="sub">Direction consistency: {{ "%.0f"|format(forecast_tracking.stats.direction_consistency) }}%</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  {% endif %}

  <!-- Forecast evolution spaghetti chart -->
  <div class="card" style="margin-bottom: 16px;">
    <h4 style="font-size: 0.85rem; margin-bottom: 8px;">12M NII Forecast Evolution</h4>
    <div class="chart-container">
      <canvas id="chart-forecast-tracking"></canvas>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Revision bar chart -->
  {% if forecast_tracking.revisions and forecast_tracking.revisions.dates %}
  <div class="grid-2" style="margin-bottom: 16px;">
    <div class="card">
      <h4 style="font-size: 0.85rem; margin-bottom: 8px;">Daily Forecast Revisions</h4>
      <div class="chart-container chart-sm">
        <canvas id="chart-forecast-revisions"></canvas>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
      <h4 style="font-size: 0.85rem; margin-bottom: 8px;">Revision % Change</h4>
      <div class="chart-container chart-sm">
        <canvas id="chart-forecast-revisions-pct"></canvas>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  {% endif %}

  <p class="footnote">
    Shows how the 12-month forward NII forecast has evolved over time.
    Stable forecasts indicate consistent rate positioning.
    High revision volatility suggests model sensitivity to market moves or portfolio changes.
  </p>

  <script>
  (function() {
    const data = {{ forecast_tracking | tojson_safe }};
    const ctx = document.getElementById('chart-forecast-tracking');
    if (!ctx || typeof Chart === 'undefined') return;

    const datasets = [];
    const colors = { CHF: '#d62828', EUR: '#e67e22', USD: '#002868', GBP: '#6f42c1' };

    for (const [ccy, values] of Object.entries(data.by_currency)) {
      datasets.push({
        label: ccy,
        data: values,
        borderColor: colors[ccy] || '#8b949e',
        backgroundColor: 'transparent',
        borderWidth: 2,
        pointRadius: 2,
        tension: 0.3,
      });
    }
    datasets.push({
      label: 'Total',
      data: data.total,
      borderColor: '#58a6ff',
      backgroundColor: 'transparent',
      borderWidth: 3,
      borderDash: [5, 3],
      pointRadius: 2,
      tension: 0.3,
    });

    new Chart(ctx, {
      type: 'line',
      data: { labels: data.dates, datasets },
      options: {
        responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
        interaction: { mode: 'index', intersect: false },
        plugins: { legend: { labels: { color: '#e6edf3', font: { size: 11 } } } },
        scales: {
          x: { ticks: { color: '#8b949e', maxRotation: 45, font: { size: 10 } } },
          y: { ticks: { color: '#8b949e' }, title: { display: true, text: '12M NII Forecast', color: '#8b949e' } }
        }
      }
    });

    // Revision bars
    var revCtx = document.getElementById('chart-forecast-revisions');
    if (revCtx && data.revisions && data.revisions.dates && data.revisions.dates.length) {
      new Chart(revCtx, {
        type: 'bar',
        data: {
          labels: data.revisions.dates,
          datasets: [{
            label: 'Revision',
            data: data.revisions.changes,
            backgroundColor: data.revisions.changes.map(v => v >= 0 ? 'rgba(63,185,80,0.7)' : 'rgba(248,81,73,0.7)'),
            borderWidth: 0,
          }]
        },
        options: {
          responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
          plugins: { legend: { display: false } },
          scales: {
            x: { ticks: { color: '#8b949e', maxRotation: 45, font: { size: 9 } } },
            y: { ticks: { color: '#8b949e' }, title: { display: true, text: 'Revision (abs)', color: '#8b949e' } }
          }
        }
      });
    }

    // Revision % bars
    var revPctCtx = document.getElementById('chart-forecast-revisions-pct');
    if (revPctCtx && data.revisions && data.revisions.dates && data.revisions.dates.length) {
      new Chart(revPctCtx, {
        type: 'bar',
        data: {
          labels: data.revisions.dates,
          datasets: [{
            label: 'Revision %',
            data: data.revisions.pct_changes,
            backgroundColor: data.revisions.pct_changes.map(v => v >= 0 ? 'rgba(63,185,80,0.7)' : 'rgba(248,81,73,0.7)'),
            borderWidth: 0,
          }]
        },
        options: {
          responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
          plugins: { legend: { display: false } },
          scales: {
            x: { ticks: { color: '#8b949e', maxRotation: 45, font: { size: 9 } } },
            y: { ticks: { color: '#8b949e', callback: function(v) { return v + '%'; } }, title: { display: true, text: 'Revision %', color: '#8b949e' } }
          }
        }
      });
    }
  })();
  </script>

  {% else %}
  <div style="text-align: center; padding: 60px; color: var(--text-secondary);">
    <p>No historical forecast data available.</p>
    <p style="font-size: 0.85rem;">Run daily P&amp;L computations to build up forecast history in <code>data/pnl_snapshots/</code>.</p>
  </div>
  {% endif %}
</div>

          <td style="text-align: right;" class="{{ 'positive' if d.alm_margin_pnl >= 0 else 'negative' }}">{{ "{:,.0f}".format(d.alm_margin_pnl) }}</td>
        </tr>
      {% endfor %}
      </tbody>
    </table>
    </div>
  </div>

  <p class="footnote">Client Margin = ClientRate &minus; FTP. ALM Margin = FTP &minus; OIS. Total NII = Client Margin + ALM Margin.</p>

  <script>
  (function() {
    const data = {{ ftp | tojson_safe }};
    const peris = data.perimeters;
    const ccys = data.by_currency;

    // Perimeter grouped bar chart
    const periLabels = Object.keys(peris);
    new Chart(document.getElementById('chart-ftp-perimeter'), {
      type: 'bar',
      data: {
        labels: periLabels,
        datasets: [
          { label: 'Client Margin', data: periLabels.map(p => peris[p].client_margin), backgroundColor: 'rgba(88,166,255,0.8)' },
          { label: 'ALM Margin', data: periLabels.map(p => peris[p].alm_margin), backgroundColor: 'rgba(63,185,80,0.8)' },
        ]
      },
      options: {
        responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
        plugins: { legend: { labels: { color: '#e6edf3', font: { size: 11 } } } },
        scales: {
          x: { ticks: { color: '#8b949e' } },
          y: { ticks: { color: '#8b949e' } }
        }
      }
    });

    // Currency grouped bar chart
    const ccyLabels = Object.keys(ccys);
    new Chart(document.getElementById('chart-ftp-currency'), {
      type: 'bar',
      data: {
        labels: ccyLabels,
        datasets: [
          { label: 'Client Margin', data: ccyLabels.map(c => ccys[c].client_margin), backgroundColor: ccyLabels.map(c => ccys[c].color + 'cc') },
          { label: 'ALM Margin', data: ccyLabels.map(c => ccys[c].alm_margin), backgroundColor: ccyLabels.map(c => ccys[c].color + '80') },
        ]
      },
      options: {
        responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
        plugins: { legend: { labels: { color: '#e6edf3', font: { size: 11 } } } },
        scales: {
          x: { ticks: { color: '#8b949e' } },
          y: { ticks: { color: '#8b949e' } }
        }
      }
    });
  })();
  </script>

  {% else %}
  <div style="text-align: center; padding: 60px; color: var(--text-secondary);">
    <p>No FTP data available.</p>
    <p style="font-size: 0.85rem;">Add an FTP column to deals.xlsx with per-deal transfer pricing rates (decimal).</p>
  </div>
  {% endif %}

          <td>{{ "{:,.0f}".format(p.instrument_pnl) }}</td>
          <td>
            {% if p.status == 'pass' %}
            <span style="color: var(--accent-green); font-weight: 600;">PASS</span>
            {% else %}
            <span style="color: var(--accent-red); font-weight: 600;">FAIL</span>
            {% endif %}
          </td>
        </tr>
      {% endfor %}
      </tbody>
    </table>
    </div>
  </div>

          <td style="text-align:right;" class="{{ 'positive' if x.instrument_pnl > 0 else 'negative' if x.instrument_pnl < 0 else '' }}">{{ "{:,.0f}".format(x.instrument_pnl) }}</td>

          <td style="text-align:right;">{{ "{:.4f}".format(x.ratio) }}</td>
        </tr>
      {% endfor %}
      </tbody>
    </table>
    </div>
    <p style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-top: 8px;">
      Shows how hedge pairs perform under each BCBS 368 stress scenario. Net P&amp;L close to zero indicates effective hedging under stress.
    </p>
  </div>
  {% endif %}

    <h4 style="font-size: 0.85rem; margin-bottom: 8px;">Hedge Cost (IRS P&amp;L by Currency)</h4>
    <div class="grid-4">
      {% for ccy, cost in hedge_strategy.hedge_cost.by_currency.items() %}
      <div class="kpi-card" style="padding: 10px;">
        <div class="label">{{ ccy }}</div>
        <div class="value {{ 'positive' if cost >= 0 else 'negative' }}" style="font-size: 1.1rem;">{{ "{:,.0f}".format(cost) }}</div>
      </div>
      {% endfor %}
    </div>
  </div>
  {% endif %}

  <!-- Hedge Optimizer Recommendations -->
  {% if hedge_strategy.has_recommendations is defined and hedge_strategy.has_recommendations %}
  <div class="card" style="margin-bottom: 16px; border-left: 3px solid var(--accent-blue);">
    <h4 style="font-size: 0.85rem; margin-bottom: 8px;">&#x1f4a1; Recommended Hedges (DV01-Based)</h4>
    <table>
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>Currency</th>
          <th style="text-align:right;">Recommended Notional</th>
          <th>Instrument</th>
          <th>Tenor</th>
          <th>Rationale</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
      {% for rec in hedge_strategy.recommendations %}
        <tr>
          <td>{{ rec.currency }}</td>
          <td style="text-align:right;">{{ "{:,.0f}".format(rec.notional) }}</td>
          <td>{{ rec.instrument }}</td>
          <td>{{ rec.tenor }}</td>
          <td style="font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--text-secondary);">{{ rec.rationale }}</td>
        </tr>
      {% endfor %}
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>
  {% endif %}

  <p class="footnote">
    Hedge Ratio = IRS/Swap notional &divide; Total notional per currency.
    Naked Exposure = sensitivity not offset by hedging instruments.
  </p>

  <script>
  (function() {
    const data = {{ hedge_strategy | tojson_safe }};

    // Coverage bar chart
    if (typeof Chart !== 'undefined' && data.coverage && data.coverage.length) {
      new Chart(document.getElementById('chart-hedge-coverage'), {
        type: 'bar',
        data: {
          labels: data.coverage.map(c => c.currency),
          datasets: [{
            label: 'Hedge Ratio %',
            data: data.coverage.map(c => (c.hedge_ratio * 100).toFixed(1)),
            backgroundColor: data.coverage.map(c => c.color),
            borderColor: data.coverage.map(c => c.color),
            borderWidth: 1,
          }]
        },
        options: {
          responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
          indexAxis: 'y',
          plugins: { legend: { display: false } },
          scales: {
            x: { min: 0, max: 100, ticks: { color: '#8b949e', callback: function(v) { return v + '%'; } }, grid: { color: '#21262d' } },
            y: { ticks: { color: '#e6edf3' }, grid: { display: false } }
          }
        }
      });
    }

    // Naked exposure stacked bar
    if (typeof Chart !== 'undefined' && data.naked_exposure && data.naked_exposure.length) {
      var ctx = document.getElementById('chart-naked-exposure');
      if (ctx) {
        new Chart(ctx, {
          type: 'bar',
          data: {
            labels: data.naked_exposure.map(n => n.currency),
            datasets: [
              {
                label: 'Hedged',
                data: data.naked_exposure.map(n => n.hedged_delta),
                backgroundColor: 'rgba(63,185,80,0.6)',
                borderColor: '#3fb950', borderWidth: 1,
              },
              {
                label: 'Naked',
                data: data.naked_exposure.map(n => n.naked_delta),
                backgroundColor: 'rgba(248,81,73,0.6)',
                borderColor: '#f85149', borderWidth: 1,
              }
            ]
          },
          options: {
            responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
            plugins: { legend: { labels: { color: '#e6edf3' } } },
            scales: {
              x: { stacked: true, ticks: { color: '#8b949e' }, grid: { color: '#21262d' } },
              y: { stacked: true, ticks: { color: '#8b949e', callback: function(v) { return v.toLocaleString(); } }, grid: { color: '#21262d' } }
            }
          }
        });
      }
    }
  })();
  </script>

  {% else %}
  <div style="text-align: center; padding: 60px; color: var(--text-secondary);">
    <p>No hedge strategy data available.</p>
    <p style="font-size: 0.85rem;">Provide deals with Direction=S (swaps/IRS) to enable hedge strategy analysis.</p>
  </div>
  {% endif %}
</div>

<div id="tab-liquidity" class="tab-content">
  <h3 style="font-size: 0.9rem; margin-bottom: 12px;">Liquidity Forecast</h3>

  {% if has_liquidity %}
  <div class="grid-4" style="margin-bottom: 16px;">
    <div class="kpi-card">
      <div class="label">Net 7 Days</div>
      <div class="value {{ 'positive' if liquidity.summary.net_7d >= 0 else 'negative' }}">{{ "{:,.0f}".format(liquidity.summary.net_7d) }}</div>
    </div>
    <div class="kpi-card">
      <div class="label">Net 30 Days</div>
      <div class="value {{ 'positive' if liquidity.summary.net_30d >= 0 else 'negative' }}">{{ "{:,.0f}".format(liquidity.summary.net_30d) }}</div>
    </div>
    <div class="kpi-card">
      <div class="label">Net 90 Days</div>
      <div class="value {{ 'positive' if liquidity.summary.net_90d >= 0 else 'negative' }}">{{ "{:,.0f}".format(liquidity.summary.net_90d) }}</div>
    </div>
    <div class="kpi-card" style="border-left: 3px solid {{ '#f85149' if liquidity.summary.survival_days is not none else 'var(--accent-green)' }};">
      <div class="label">Survival Horizon</div>
      <div class="value">{% if liquidity.summary.survival_days is not none %}{{ liquidity.summary.survival_days }}d{% else %}No deficit{% endif %}</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="controls" id="liq-ccy-ctrl"></div>

  <div class="card" style="margin-bottom: 16px;">
    <div class="chart-container" style="height: 400px;">
      <canvas id="chart-liquidity"></canvas>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Top maturities in next 30 days -->
  {% if liquidity.top_maturities %}
  <div class="card">
    <h4 style="font-size: 0.85rem; margin-bottom: 8px;">Top Cash Flows — Next 30 Days</h4>
    <div style="overflow-x: auto;">
    <table>
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>Deal</th><th>CCY</th><th>Direction</th><th>Date</th><th>Amount</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
      {% for m in liquidity.top_maturities %}
        <tr>
          <td>{{ m.deal_id }}</td>
          <td>{{ m.currency }}</td>
          <td>{{ m.direction }}</td>
          <td>{{ m.date }}</td>
          <td style="text-align: right;" class="{{ 'positive' if m.amount >= 0 else 'negative' }}">{{ "{:,.0f}".format(m.amount) }}</td>
        </tr>
      {% endfor %}
      </tbody>
    </table>
    </div>
  </div>
  {% endif %}

  <!-- Reinvestment What-If -->
  {% if liquidity.reinvestment %}
  <div class="card" style="margin-top: 16px;">
    <h4 style="font-size: 0.85rem; margin-bottom: 8px;">Reinvestment What-If &mdash; Maturing Assets at Market Rates</h4>
    <table>
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>Currency</th>
          <th style="text-align:right;">Maturing Volume</th>
          <th style="text-align:right;">Book Rate</th>
          <th style="text-align:right;">Market Rate</th>
          <th style="text-align:right;">Spread (bps)</th>
          <th style="text-align:right;">NII Impact</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
      {% for r in liquidity.reinvestment %}
        <tr>
          <td>{{ r.currency }}</td>
          <td style="text-align:right;">{{ "{:,.0f}".format(r.maturing_volume) }}</td>
          <td style="text-align:right;">{{ "%.4f"|format(r.book_rate_pct) }}%</td>
          <td style="text-align:right;">{{ "%.4f"|format(r.market_rate_pct) }}%</td>
          <td style="text-align:right;" class="{{ 'positive' if r.spread_bps > 0 else 'negative' if r.spread_bps < 0 else '' }}">{{ "{:+.1f}".format(r.spread_bps) }}</td>
          <td style="text-align:right;" class="{{ 'positive' if r.nii_impact > 0 else 'negative' if r.nii_impact < 0 else '' }}">{{ "{:+,.0f}".format(r.nii_impact) }}</td>
        </tr>
      {% endfor %}
      </tbody>
    </table>
    <p class="footnote">If maturing assets are reinvested at current OIS forward rate. Positive spread = reinvestment at higher rate (NII gain).</p>
  </div>
  {% endif %}

  <p class="footnote">Inflows (green) = maturing assets. Outflows (red) = maturing liabilities. Blue line = cumulative net position.</p>

  <script>
  (function() {
    const data = {{ liquidity | tojson_safe }};
    const ccys = data.all_currencies || Object.keys(data.by_currency);

    // Build "All" aggregate
    const allCcys = Object.keys(data.by_currency);
    if (allCcys.length > 0) {
      const first = data.by_currency[allCcys[0]];
      const allData = {
        labels: first.labels,
        inflows: first.labels.map(() => 0),
        outflows: first.labels.map(() => 0),
        net: first.labels.map(() => 0),
        cumulative: [],
      };
      allCcys.forEach(c => {
        const d = data.by_currency[c];
        for (let i = 0; i < d.inflows.length; i++) {
          allData.inflows[i] += d.inflows[i];
          allData.outflows[i] += d.outflows[i];
          allData.net[i] += d.net[i];
        }
      });
      let cum = 0;
      allData.net.forEach(n => { cum += n; allData.cumulative.push(cum); });
      data.by_currency['All'] = allData;
    }

    const ctrl = document.getElementById('liq-ccy-ctrl');
    const allBtns = ['All'].concat(ccys);
    allBtns.forEach((c, i) => {
      const btn = document.createElement('button');
      btn.className = 'ctrl-btn' + (i === 0 ? ' active' : '');
      btn.textContent = c;
      btn.onclick = function() {
        ctrl.querySelectorAll('.ctrl-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
        this.classList.add('active');
        updateChart(c);
      };
      ctrl.appendChild(btn);
    });

    const ctx = document.getElementById('chart-liquidity');
    let chart;
    function updateChart(ccy) {
      const d = data.by_currency[ccy];
      if (!d) return;
      if (chart) chart.destroy();

      // Thin down labels for readability: show every Nth label
      const step = d.labels.length > 30 ? Math.ceil(d.labels.length / 30) : 1;
      const displayLabels = d.labels.map((l, i) => i % step === 0 ? l : '');

      chart = new Chart(ctx, {
        type: 'bar',
        data: {
          labels: displayLabels,
          datasets: [
            {
              label: 'Inflows',
              data: d.inflows,
              backgroundColor: 'rgba(63,185,80,0.7)',
              stack: 'cashflow',
            },
            {
              label: 'Outflows',
              data: d.outflows,
              backgroundColor: 'rgba(248,81,73,0.7)',
              stack: 'cashflow',
            },
            {
              label: 'Cumulative Net',
              data: d.cumulative,
              type: 'line',
              borderColor: '#58a6ff',
              backgroundColor: 'transparent',
              borderWidth: 2,
              pointRadius: 0,
              yAxisID: 'y1',
            },
          ]
        },
        options: {
          responsive: true,
          maintainAspectRatio: false,
          plugins: {
            legend: { labels: { color: '#e6edf3', font: { size: 11 } } },
            tooltip: { mode: 'index', intersect: false },
          },
          scales: {
            x: { stacked: true, ticks: { color: '#8b949e', maxRotation: 45, font: { size: 9 } } },
            y: { stacked: true, position: 'left', ticks: { color: '#8b949e' }, title: { display: true, text: 'Cash Flow', color: '#8b949e' } },
            y1: { position: 'right', ticks: { color: '#58a6ff' }, title: { display: true, text: 'Cumulative', color: '#58a6ff' }, grid: { drawOnChartArea: false } },
          }
        }
      });
    }
    updateChart('All');
  })();
  </script>

  {% else %}
  <div style="text-align: center; padding: 60px; color: var(--text-secondary);">
    <p>No liquidity schedule data available.</p>
    <p style="font-size: 0.85rem;">Provide liquidity_schedule.xlsx with daily (90d) + monthly cash flow projections per deal.</p>
  </div>
  {% endif %}
</div>

===FILE END=== src/cockpit/pnl_dashboard/templates/_liquidity.html

===FILE START=== src/cockpit/pnl_dashboard/templates/_macros.html
{#- Shared Jinja2 macro library for the P&L dashboard.
    Import in any template:  {% from "_macros.html" import kpi_card, chart_container, data_table, metric_badge %}
-#}

{#- KPI card with optional colored left border and sub-label.
    Arguments:
      label       – header text
      value       – main display value (string or number)
      css_class   – extra class on the value div ("positive", "negative", "")
      sub         – optional sub-label text below the value
      border_color – optional left-border color (hex string, e.g. "#f85149")
      id          – optional id for the value div (for JS hydration)
      sub_id      – optional id for the sub div
-#}
{% macro kpi_card(label, value="—", css_class="", sub="", border_color="", id="", sub_id="") %}
<div class="kpi-card"{% if border_color %} style="border-left: 3px solid {{ border_color }};"{% endif %}>
  <div class="kpi-label">{{ label }}</div>
  <div class="kpi-value {{ css_class }}"{% if id %} id="{{ id }}"{% endif %}>{{ value }}</div>
  {% if sub %}<div class="sub"{% if sub_id %} id="{{ sub_id }}"{% endif %}>{{ sub }}</div>{% endif %}
</div>
{% endmacro %}

{#- Chart container: a .card wrapper with a title and a <canvas>.
    Arguments:
      title    – card heading
      chart_id – canvas element id
      height   – canvas height attribute (default 250)
-#}
{% macro chart_container(title, chart_id, height=250) %}
<div class="card">
  <h3>{{ title }}</h3>
  <canvas id="{{ chart_id }}" height="{{ height }}"></canvas>
</div>
{% endmacro %}

{#- Data table with auto-generated <thead> and <tbody>.
    Arguments:
      headers    – list of column header strings
      rows       – list of lists (each inner list = one row's cell values)
      aligns     – optional list of "left"/"right"/"center" per column
      footer_row – optional list (rendered bold with top border)
-#}
{% macro data_table(headers, rows, aligns=none, footer_row=none) %}
<table>
  <thead>
    <tr>
      {% for h in headers %}
      <th{% if aligns and aligns[loop.index0] != "left" %} style="text-align:{{ aligns[loop.index0] }};"{% endif %}>{{ h }}</th>
      {% endfor %}
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    {% for row in rows %}
    <tr>
      {% for cell in row %}
      <td{% if aligns and aligns[loop.index0] != "left" %} style="text-align:{{ aligns[loop.index0] }};"{% endif %}>{{ cell }}</td>
      {% endfor %}
    </tr>
    {% endfor %}
    {% if footer_row %}
    <tr style="font-weight: bold; border-top: 2px solid var(--border);">
      {% for cell in footer_row %}
      <td{% if aligns and aligns[loop.index0] != "left" %} style="text-align:{{ aligns[loop.index0] }};"{% endif %}>{{ cell }}</td>
      {% endfor %}
    </tr>
    {% endif %}
  </tbody>
</table>
{% endmacro %}

{#- Inline severity / metric badge.
    Arguments:
      text      – badge text (e.g. "CRITICAL", "PASS", "FAIL")
      severity  – "critical", "high", "medium", "success", "info"
-#}
{% macro metric_badge(text, severity="info") %}
{%- set colors = {
  "critical": {"bg": "rgba(248,81,73,0.2)", "fg": "var(--accent-red)"},
  "high":     {"bg": "rgba(210,153,34,0.2)", "fg": "var(--accent-yellow)"},
  "medium":   {"bg": "rgba(88,166,255,0.2)", "fg": "var(--accent-blue)"},
  "success":  {"bg": "rgba(63,185,80,0.2)",  "fg": "var(--accent-green)"},
  "info":     {"bg": "rgba(139,148,158,0.2)", "fg": "var(--text-secondary)"},
} -%}
{%- set c = colors.get(severity, colors.info) -%}
<span style="font-size: 0.7rem; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 3px; background: {{ c.bg }}; color: {{ c.fg }};">{{ text }}</span>
{% endmacro %}

{#- Empty-state placeholder when a tab has no data.
    Arguments:
      message – main message text
      hint    – optional smaller hint text
-#}
{% macro empty_state(message, hint="") %}
<div class="card" style="text-align: center; padding: 48px;">
  <p style="color: var(--text-secondary);">{{ message }}</p>
  {% if hint %}<p style="font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--text-secondary);">{{ hint }}</p>{% endif %}
</div>
{% endmacro %}

===FILE END=== src/cockpit/pnl_dashboard/templates/_macros.html

===FILE START=== src/cockpit/pnl_dashboard/templates/_maturity_wall.html
<div id="tab-maturity-wall" class="tab-content">
  <h3 style="font-size: 0.9rem; margin-bottom: 12px;">Maturity Wall &amp; Reinvestment Risk</h3>

  {% if has_maturity_wall %}
  <!-- KPI Cards -->
  <div class="grid-4" style="margin-bottom: 16px;">
    <div class="kpi-card">
      <div class="label">Total Maturing (24M)</div>

      <div class="sub">{{ maturity_wall.kpis.deal_count }} deals</div>
    </div>
    <div class="kpi-card" style="border-left: 3px solid {{ '#3fb950' if maturity_wall.kpis.total_nii_impact >= 0 else '#f85149' }};">
      <div class="label">Reinvestment NII Impact</div>
      <div class="value {{ 'positive' if maturity_wall.kpis.total_nii_impact >= 0 else 'negative' }}">{{ "{:+,.0f}".format(maturity_wall.kpis.total_nii_impact) }}</div>

    </div>
    <div class="kpi-card">
      <div class="label">Avg Reinvestment Spread</div>
      <div class="value {{ 'positive' if maturity_wall.kpis.avg_spread_bps >= 0 else 'negative' }}">{{ "{:+.1f}".format(maturity_wall.kpis.avg_spread_bps) }} bps</div>
      <div class="sub">market vs book</div>
    </div>
    <div class="kpi-card">
      <div class="label">Months to Cliff</div>
      <div class="value">{% if maturity_wall.kpis.months_to_cliff is not none %}{{ maturity_wall.kpis.months_to_cliff }}M{% else %}None{% endif %}</div>
      <div class="sub">&gt;10% of total maturing</div>

  <!-- Reinvestment summary table -->
  <div class="card" style="margin-bottom: 16px;">

    <table>
      <thead>

          <td style="text-align:right;">{{ "%.4f"|format(r.market_rate) }}</td>

          <td style="text-align:right;" class="{{ 'positive' if r.nii_impact >= 0 else 'negative' }}">{{ "{:+,.0f}".format(r.nii_impact) }}</td>
        </tr>
      {% endfor %}
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- Top upcoming maturities -->
  <div class="card">
    <h4 style="font-size: 0.85rem; margin-bottom: 8px;">Top 20 Upcoming Maturities</h4>
    <div style="overflow-x: auto;">
    <table>
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>Deal</th><th>Counterparty</th><th>CCY</th><th>Product</th>
          <th>Maturity</th><th>Nominal</th>
          <th>Book %</th><th>Market %</th><th>Spread (bps)</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
      {% for d in maturity_wall.top_maturities %}
        <tr>
          <td>{{ d.deal_id }}</td>
          <td>{{ d.counterparty }}</td>
          <td>{{ d.currency }}</td>
          <td>{{ d.product }}</td>
          <td>{{ d.maturity }}</td>
          <td style="text-align:right;">{{ "{:,.0f}".format(d.nominal) }}</td>
          <td style="text-align:right;">{{ "%.4f"|format(d.book_rate_pct) }}</td>
          <td style="text-align:right;">{{ "%.4f"|format(d.market_rate_pct) }}</td>
          <td style="text-align:right;" class="{{ 'positive' if d.spread_bps >= 0 else 'negative' }}">{{ "{:+.1f}".format(d.spread_bps) }}</td>
        </tr>
      {% endfor %}
      </tbody>
    </table>
    </div>
  </div>

  <p class="footnote">
    Spread = Current OIS &minus; Book Rate. Positive = reinvestment uplift (green); Negative = reinvestment drag (red).
    NII Impact = Maturing Volume &times; Spread (annualized). "Months to Cliff" = first month with &gt;10% of total volume maturing.
  </p>

  <script>
  (function() {
    const data = {{ maturity_wall | tojson_safe }};
    const months = data.months;

    // Currency stacked bar
    if (typeof Chart !== 'undefined' && data.by_currency && months.length) {
      const ccys = Object.keys(data.by_currency);
      new Chart(document.getElementById('chart-matwall-currency'), {
        type: 'bar',
        data: {
          labels: months,
          datasets: ccys.map(function(ccy) {
            var d = data.by_currency[ccy];
            return {
              label: ccy,
              data: d.volumes,
              backgroundColor: d.color + 'cc',
              stack: 's',
            };
          })
        },
        options: {
          responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
          plugins: { legend: { labels: { color: '#e6edf3', font: { size: 11 } } } },
          scales: {
            x: { stacked: true, ticks: { color: '#8b949e', maxRotation: 45 } },
            y: { stacked: true, ticks: { color: '#8b949e' }, title: { display: true, text: 'Maturing Volume', color: '#8b949e' } }
          }
        }
      });
    }

    // Product stacked bar
    if (typeof Chart !== 'undefined' && data.by_product && months.length) {
      var prods = Object.keys(data.by_product);
      new Chart(document.getElementById('chart-matwall-product'), {
        type: 'bar',
        data: {
          labels: months,
          datasets: prods.map(function(p) {
            var d = data.by_product[p];
            return {
              label: p,
              data: d.volumes,
              backgroundColor: d.color + 'cc',
              stack: 's',
            };
          })
        },
        options: {
          responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
          plugins: { legend: { labels: { color: '#e6edf3', font: { size: 11 } } } },
          scales: {
            x: { stacked: true, ticks: { color: '#8b949e', maxRotation: 45 } },
            y: { stacked: true, ticks: { color: '#8b949e' } }
          }
        }
      });
    }
  })();
  </script>

  {% else %}
  <div style="text-align: center; padding: 60px; color: var(--text-secondary);">
    <p>No maturity data available.</p>
    <p style="font-size: 0.85rem;">Provide deals with Maturitydate to enable the Maturity Wall.</p>

      </div>

  </div>

            {{ "{:,.0f}".format(row.get(ccy, 0)) }}
          </td>
          {% endfor %}

      </table>

      </div>

  <script>
  (function() {
    const tornado = {{ nii_at_risk.tornado | tojson_safe }};
    const ctx = document.getElementById('chart-nii-tornado');
    if (ctx && typeof Chart !== 'undefined' && tornado.length > 0) {
      new Chart(ctx, {
        type: 'bar',
        data: {
          labels: tornado.map(r => r.scenario),
          datasets: [{
            label: 'ΔNII',
            data: tornado.map(r => r.delta),
            backgroundColor: tornado.map(r => r.delta >= 0 ? 'rgba(63,185,80,0.7)' : 'rgba(248,81,73,0.7)'),
            borderColor: tornado.map(r => r.delta >= 0 ? 'rgba(63,185,80,1)' : 'rgba(248,81,73,1)'),
            borderWidth: 1,
          }]
        },
        options: {
          indexAxis: 'y',
          responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
          plugins: {
            legend: { display: false },
            tooltip: {
              callbacks: {
                label: function(ctx) { return 'ΔNII: ' + ctx.raw.toLocaleString(); }
              }
            }
          },
          scales: {
            x: {
              ticks: { color: '#8b949e', callback: v => v.toLocaleString() },
              grid: { color: '#21262d' }
            },
            y: { ticks: { color: '#e6edf3', font: { size: 11 } } }
          }
        }
      });
    }
  })();
  </script>

  <!-- Parametric Earnings-at-Risk (indicative) -->
  {% if nii_at_risk.ear %}
  <div class="card" style="margin-top: 16px;">
    <h3 style="font-size: 0.85rem; margin-bottom: 8px;">Parametric Earnings-at-Risk (EaR) &mdash; <span style="color: var(--accent-yellow);">Indicative</span></h3>
    <div class="grid-4" style="margin-bottom: 12px;">
      <div class="kpi-card">

          <span style="color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.85rem;"> to </span>
          <span class="positive">{{ "{:+,.0f}".format(nii_at_risk.ear.max_delta) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="sub">{{ nii_at_risk.ear.n_scenarios }} BCBS scenarios</div>
      </div>
      <div class="kpi-card">
        <div class="kpi-label">Mean &Delta;NII / Std Dev</div>
        <div class="kpi-value {{ 'negative' if nii_at_risk.ear.mean_delta < 0 else 'positive' }}">
          {{ "{:,.0f}".format(nii_at_risk.ear.mean_delta) }}
        </div>
        <div class="sub">&sigma; = {{ "{:,.0f}".format(nii_at_risk.ear.std_delta) }}</div>
      </div>
      <div class="kpi-card" style="border-left: 3px solid var(--accent-orange);">
        <div class="kpi-label">EaR 95% (1.645&sigma;)</div>
        <div class="kpi-value negative">{{ "{:,.0f}".format(nii_at_risk.ear.ear_95) }}</div>
        <div class="sub">{{ nii_at_risk.ear.ear_95_pct }}% of base NII</div>
      </div>

        <div class="kpi-value negative">{{ "{:,.0f}".format(nii_at_risk.ear.ear_99) }}</div>

      </div>
    </div>
    <p style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--accent-yellow); margin-bottom: 4px;">
      &#9888; Indicative only — parametric EaR from {{ nii_at_risk.ear.n_scenarios }} discrete scenarios is statistically limited.
    </p>
    <p style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--text-secondary);">
      EaR = &mu; &minus; z&sigma; assuming normal distribution. For robust tail risk, use historical simulation with full curve time series.
      Observed scenario &Delta;NII range: {{ "{:,.0f}".format(nii_at_risk.ear.min_delta) }} to {{ "{:+,.0f}".format(nii_at_risk.ear.max_delta) }}.
    </p>
  </div>
  {% endif %}

  <p class="footnote">NIM = NII (annualized) &divide; Average Earning Assets &times; 10,000. Jaws: green spread = positive margin; narrowing jaws = margin compression risk.</p>

  <script>
  (function() {
    const data = {{ nim | tojson_safe }};

    // Jaws chart
    if (typeof Chart !== 'undefined' && data.jaws && data.jaws.months && data.jaws.months.length) {
      new Chart(document.getElementById('chart-nim-jaws'), {
        type: 'line',
        data: {
          labels: data.jaws.months,
          datasets: [
            {
              label: 'Asset Yield',
              data: data.jaws.asset_yield,
              borderColor: '#3fb950',
              backgroundColor: 'rgba(63,185,80,0.1)',
              fill: false,
              tension: 0.3,
              borderWidth: 2,
              pointRadius: 3,
            },
            {
              label: 'Funding Cost',
              data: data.jaws.funding_cost,
              borderColor: '#f85149',
              backgroundColor: 'rgba(248,81,73,0.1)',
              fill: false,
              tension: 0.3,
              borderWidth: 2,
              pointRadius: 3,
            },
            {
              label: 'NIM (spread)',
              data: data.jaws.nim,
              borderColor: '#58a6ff',
              backgroundColor: 'rgba(88,166,255,0.15)',
              fill: true,
              tension: 0.3,
              borderWidth: 2,
              borderDash: [5, 3],
              pointRadius: 2,
              yAxisID: 'y1',
            }
          ]
        },
        options: {
          responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
          interaction: { mode: 'index', intersect: false },
          plugins: { legend: { labels: { color: '#e6edf3', font: { size: 11 } } } },
          scales: {
            x: { ticks: { color: '#8b949e' } },
            y: { position: 'left', ticks: { color: '#8b949e' }, title: { display: true, text: 'Rate (bps)', color: '#8b949e' } },
            y1: { position: 'right', grid: { drawOnChartArea: false }, ticks: { color: '#8b949e' }, title: { display: true, text: 'NIM (bps)', color: '#8b949e' } }
          }
        }
      });
    }

    // NIM by currency bar chart
    if (typeof Chart !== 'undefined' && data.by_currency) {
      const ccys = Object.keys(data.by_currency);
      new Chart(document.getElementById('chart-nim-currency'), {
        type: 'bar',
        data: {
          labels: ccys,
          datasets: [{
            label: 'NIM (bps)',
            data: ccys.map(c => data.by_currency[c].nim_bps),
            backgroundColor: ccys.map(c => data.by_currency[c].color + 'cc'),
            borderWidth: 0,
          }]
        },
        options: {
          responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
          plugins: { legend: { display: false } },
          scales: {
            x: { ticks: { color: '#8b949e' } },
            y: { ticks: { color: '#8b949e' }, title: { display: true, text: 'NIM (bps)', color: '#8b949e' } }
          }
        }
      });
    }

    // NIM by perimeter bar chart
    var periCanvas = document.getElementById('chart-nim-perimeter');
    if (typeof Chart !== 'undefined' && periCanvas && data.by_perimeter) {
      const peris = Object.keys(data.by_perimeter);
      new Chart(periCanvas, {
        type: 'bar',
        data: {
          labels: peris,
          datasets: [{
            label: 'NIM (bps)',
            data: peris.map(p => data.by_perimeter[p].nim_bps),
            backgroundColor: ['rgba(88,166,255,0.8)', 'rgba(63,185,80,0.8)', 'rgba(210,153,34,0.8)', 'rgba(139,148,158,0.8)'],
            borderWidth: 0,
          }]
        },
        options: {
          responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
          plugins: { legend: { display: false } },
          scales: {
            x: { ticks: { color: '#8b949e' } },
            y: { ticks: { color: '#8b949e' }, title: { display: true, text: 'NIM (bps)', color: '#8b949e' } }
          }
        }
      });
    }
  })();
  </script>

        <td>{{ "%.1f"|format(d.behavioral_maturity_years) }}Y</td>
      </tr>
      {% endfor %}
    </tbody>
  </table>
  </div>
</div>
{% endif %}

<p class="footnote" style="margin-top: 12px; color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.75rem;">
  NMD behavioral model: nominal(t) = nominal(0) &times; exp(-decay &times; t). Deposit beta: effective_rate = floor + &beta; &times; max(0, OIS - floor).
</p>

<script>
(function() {
  {% if nmd_audit.chart and nmd_audit.chart.currencies %}
  var nmdDatasets = [];
  {% for ds in nmd_audit.chart.datasets %}
  nmdDatasets.push({
    label: {{ ds.label | tojson_safe }},
    data: {{ ds.data | tojson_safe }},
    backgroundColor: {{ ds.color | tojson_safe }} + 'cc',
    borderWidth: 0,
    borderRadius: 3,
  });
  {% endfor %}
  new Chart(document.getElementById('nmdTierChart'), {
    type: 'bar',
    data: {
      labels: {{ nmd_audit.chart.currencies | tojson_safe }},
      datasets: nmdDatasets,
    },
    options: {
      responsive: true,
      plugins: { legend: { labels: { color: '#e6edf3' } } },
      scales: {
        x: { stacked: true, grid: { display: false }, ticks: { color: '#e6edf3' } },
        y: { stacked: true, grid: { color: '#30363d' }, ticks: { color: '#8b949e' }, title: { display: true, text: 'Nominal', color: '#8b949e' } },
      }
    }
  });
  {% endif %}
})();
</script>

<div id="tab-peer-benchmark" class="tab-content">
  <h3 style="font-size: 0.9rem; margin-bottom: 12px;">Peer Benchmark &mdash; FINMA IRRBB Aggregate Comparison</h3>

  {% if has_peer_benchmark %}

  <div class="card" style="margin-bottom: 16px;">
    <h3 style="font-size: 0.85rem; margin-bottom: 8px;">Your Position vs Swiss Banking Sector</h3>
    <table>
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>Metric</th>
          <th style="text-align:right;">Your Value</th>
          <th style="text-align:right;">Sector Median</th>
          <th style="text-align:right;">25th Pctl</th>
          <th style="text-align:right;">75th Pctl</th>
          <th style="text-align:right;">Your Pctl</th>
          <th>Assessment</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        {% for comp in peer_benchmark.comparisons %}
        <tr>
          <td>{{ comp.metric }}</td>
          <td style="text-align:right;">{{ "{:.2f}".format(comp.bank_value) }}{{ comp.unit }}</td>
          <td style="text-align:right;">{{ "{:.2f}".format(comp.median) }}{{ comp.unit }}</td>
          <td style="text-align:right;">{{ "{:.2f}".format(comp.p25) }}{{ comp.unit }}</td>
          <td style="text-align:right;">{{ "{:.2f}".format(comp.p75) }}{{ comp.unit }}</td>
          <td style="text-align:right;" class="{{ 'positive' if comp.percentile < 50 else 'negative' if comp.percentile > 75 else 'neutral' }}">
            {{ "{:.0f}".format(comp.percentile) }}%
          </td>
          <td>{{ metric_badge(comp.assessment, comp.severity) }}</td>
        </tr>
        {% endfor %}
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <div class="card">
    <h3 style="font-size: 0.85rem; margin-bottom: 8px;">Percentile Position</h3>
    <canvas id="peerBenchmarkChart" height="250"></canvas>
  </div>

  <script>
  (function() {
    const data = {{ peer_benchmark | tojson_safe }};
    if (!data || !data.comparisons) return;

    const labels = data.comparisons.map(c => c.metric);
    const bankVals = data.comparisons.map(c => c.percentile);

    new Chart(document.getElementById('peerBenchmarkChart'), {
      type: 'bar',
      data: {
        labels: labels,
        datasets: [{
          label: 'Your Percentile',
          data: bankVals,
          backgroundColor: bankVals.map(v => v > 75 ? '#f85149' : v > 50 ? '#d29922' : '#3fb950'),
          borderWidth: 0,
          borderRadius: 3,
        }]
      },
      options: {
        indexAxis: 'y',
        responsive: true,
        plugins: {
          legend: { display: false },
          annotation: {
            annotations: {
              median: { type: 'line', xMin: 50, xMax: 50, borderColor: '#8b949e', borderDash: [5, 5], label: { display: true, content: 'Median', color: '#8b949e' } }
            }
          }
        },
        scales: {
          x: { min: 0, max: 100, grid: { color: '#30363d' }, ticks: { color: '#8b949e', callback: v => v + '%' } },
          y: { grid: { display: false }, ticks: { color: '#e6edf3' } }
        }
      }
    });
  })();
  </script>

  <p class="footnote">Peer data: FINMA IRRBB aggregate statistics (Category 3-5 banks). Lower percentile = less risk exposure relative to peers.</p>

  {% else %}
  {{ empty_state("No peer benchmark data available.", "Requires EVE or NII-at-Risk computation to compare against FINMA aggregates.") }}
  {% endif %}
</div>

===FILE START=== src/cockpit/pnl_dashboard/templates/_pnl_series.html
<div id="tab-pnl-series" class="tab-content">
  <h3 style="font-size: 0.9rem; margin-bottom: 12px;">P&amp;L Time Series</h3>

  <!-- Shock selector -->
  <div class="controls">
    <span style="color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.8rem; line-height: 32px; margin-right: 8px;">Shock:</span>
    <button class="ctrl-btn active" onclick="setPnlShock('0')">Base</button>
    <button class="ctrl-btn" onclick="setPnlShock('50')">+50bp</button>
    <button class="ctrl-btn" onclick="setPnlShock('wirp')">WIRP</button>
  </div>

  <!-- Main chart: by currency -->
  <div class="card">
    <h3 style="font-size: 0.85rem; margin-bottom: 8px;">Monthly P&amp;L by Currency</h3>
    <div class="chart-container">
      <canvas id="chart-pnl-currency"></canvas>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Product breakdown -->
  <div class="card">
    <h3 style="font-size: 0.85rem; margin-bottom: 8px;">Product Breakdown (Base)</h3>
    <div class="chart-container">
      <canvas id="chart-pnl-product"></canvas>
    </div>
  </div>

  <script>
  (function() {
    const pnlData = {{ pnl_series | tojson_safe }};
    const colors = { CHF: '#d62828', EUR: '#e67e22', USD: '#002868', GBP: '#6f42c1' };
    let currentShock = '0';
    let pnlCurrencyChart = null;
    let pnlProductChart = null;

    function renderCurrencyChart() {
      const ctx = document.getElementById('chart-pnl-currency');
      if (!ctx || typeof Chart === 'undefined' || !pnlData.months.length) return;
      if (pnlCurrencyChart) pnlCurrencyChart.destroy();

      const datasets = [];
      const shockKey = 'shock_' + currentShock;

      for (const [ccy, shocks] of Object.entries(pnlData.by_currency)) {
        // Realized portion (solid)
        const realizedKey = shockKey + '_realized';
        const forecastKey = shockKey + '_forecast';

        if (shocks[realizedKey] && shocks[forecastKey]) {
          datasets.push({
            label: ccy + ' (Realized)',
            data: shocks[realizedKey],
            backgroundColor: colors[ccy] || '#8b949e',
            stack: 'main',
          });
          datasets.push({
            label: ccy + ' (Forecast)',
            data: shocks[forecastKey],
            backgroundColor: (colors[ccy] || '#8b949e') + '66',
            stack: 'main',
          });
        } else {
          datasets.push({
            label: ccy,
            data: shocks[shockKey] || [],
            backgroundColor: colors[ccy] || '#8b949e',
            stack: 'main',
          });
        }
      }

      // Cumulative line
      const cumulative = [];
      let running = 0;
      for (let i = 0; i < pnlData.months.length; i++) {
        let monthTotal = 0;
        for (const shocks of Object.values(pnlData.by_currency)) {
          const vals = shocks['shock_' + currentShock] || [];
          monthTotal += vals[i] || 0;
        }
        running += monthTotal;
        cumulative.push(running);
      }
      datasets.push({
        label: 'Cumulative',
        data: cumulative,
        type: 'line',
        borderColor: '#58a6ff',
        backgroundColor: 'transparent',
        borderWidth: 2,
        pointRadius: 0,
        tension: 0.3,
        yAxisID: 'y1',
      });

      pnlCurrencyChart = new Chart(ctx, {
        type: 'bar',
        data: { labels: pnlData.months, datasets },
        options: {
          responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
          interaction: { mode: 'index', intersect: false },
          plugins: {
            legend: { labels: { color: '#e6edf3', font: { size: 10 } } },
            annotation: pnlData.date_rates_month ? {
              annotations: { ratesLine: {
                type: 'line', scaleID: 'x',
                value: pnlData.date_rates_month,
                borderColor: '#d29922', borderDash: [5,3], borderWidth: 1,
                label: { display: true, content: 'Rates', color: '#d29922', font: { size: 10 } }
              }}
            } : undefined,
          },
          scales: {
            x: { stacked: true, ticks: { color: '#8b949e', maxRotation: 45, font: { size: 10 } } },
            y: { stacked: true, ticks: { color: '#8b949e' }, title: { display: true, text: 'P&L', color: '#8b949e' } },
            y1: { position: 'right', grid: { drawOnChartArea: false }, ticks: { color: '#58a6ff' }, title: { display: true, text: 'Cumulative', color: '#58a6ff' } }
          }
        }
      });
    }

    function renderProductChart() {
      const ctx = document.getElementById('chart-pnl-product');
      if (!ctx || typeof Chart === 'undefined' || !pnlData.months.length) return;
      if (pnlProductChart) pnlProductChart.destroy();

      const datasets = [];
      for (const [prod, info] of Object.entries(pnlData.by_product)) {
        datasets.push({
          label: prod,
          data: info.values,
          backgroundColor: info.color,
          stack: 'prod',
        });
      }

      pnlProductChart = new Chart(ctx, {
        type: 'bar',
        data: { labels: pnlData.months, datasets },
        options: {
          responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
          plugins: { legend: { labels: { color: '#e6edf3', font: { size: 10 } } } },
          scales: {
            x: { stacked: true, ticks: { color: '#8b949e', maxRotation: 45, font: { size: 10 } } },
            y: { stacked: true, ticks: { color: '#8b949e' } }
          }
        }
      });
    }

    window.setPnlShock = function(shock) {
      currentShock = shock;
      const labels = {'0':'Base','50':'+50bp','wirp':'WIRP'};
      document.querySelectorAll('#tab-pnl-series .controls .ctrl-btn').forEach(b => {
        b.classList.toggle('active', b.textContent.trim() === labels[shock]);
      });
      renderCurrencyChart();
    };

    renderCurrencyChart();
    renderProductChart();
  })();
  </script>
</div>

===FILE END=== src/cockpit/pnl_dashboard/templates/_pnl_series.html

===FILE START=== src/cockpit/pnl_dashboard/templates/_repricing_gap.html
<div id="tab-repricing-gap" class="tab-content">
  <h3 style="font-size: 0.9rem; margin-bottom: 12px;">Repricing Gap Profile</h3>

  {% if has_repricing_gap %}
  <div class="controls" id="reprice-ccy-ctrl"></div>

  <div class="card">
    <div class="chart-container">
      <canvas id="chart-repricing"></canvas>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="card">
    <h3 style="font-size: 0.85rem; margin-bottom: 8px;">Gap Detail</h3>
    <div style="overflow-x: auto;">
    <table id="tbl-repricing">
      <thead><tr><th>Bucket</th><th>Assets</th><th>Liabilities</th><th>Gap</th><th>Cumulative Gap</th></tr></thead>
      <tbody></tbody>
    </table>
    </div>
  </div>

  <p class="footnote">Fixed-rate deals reprice at maturity. Floating-rate deals reprice at next fixing date. Buckets follow Basel IRRBB time bands.</p>

  <script>
  (function() {
    const data = {{ repricing_gap | tojson_safe }};
    const buckets = data.buckets;

    // Currency selector
    const ctrl = document.getElementById('reprice-ccy-ctrl');
    const ccys = Object.keys(data.by_currency);
    ccys.forEach(c => {
      const btn = document.createElement('button');
      btn.className = 'ctrl-btn' + (c === 'All' ? ' active' : '');
      btn.textContent = c;
      btn.onclick = function() {
        ctrl.querySelectorAll('.ctrl-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
        this.classList.add('active');
        updateChart(c);
        updateTable(c);
      };
      ctrl.appendChild(btn);
    });

    const ctx = document.getElementById('chart-repricing');
    if (!ctx || typeof Chart === 'undefined') return;

    let chart;
    function updateChart(ccy) {
      const d = data.by_currency[ccy];
      if (chart) chart.destroy();
      chart = new Chart(ctx, {
        type: 'bar',
        data: {
          labels: buckets,
          datasets: [
            { label: 'Assets', data: d.assets, backgroundColor: 'rgba(63,185,80,0.7)' },
            { label: 'Liabilities', data: d.liabilities.map(v => -Math.abs(v)), backgroundColor: 'rgba(248,81,73,0.7)' },
            { label: 'Cumulative Gap', data: d.cumulative_gap, type: 'line', borderColor: '#58a6ff', backgroundColor: 'transparent', borderWidth: 2, pointRadius: 3, yAxisID: 'y' },
          ]
        },
        options: {
          responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
          plugins: { legend: { labels: { color: '#e6edf3', font: { size: 11 } } } },
          scales: {
            x: { ticks: { color: '#8b949e', font: { size: 10 } } },
            y: { ticks: { color: '#8b949e' } }
          }
        }
      });
    }

    function updateTable(ccy) {
      const d = data.by_currency[ccy];
      const tbody = document.querySelector('#tbl-repricing tbody');
      tbody.innerHTML = '';
      buckets.forEach((b, i) => {
        const gap = d.gap[i];
        const cum = d.cumulative_gap[i];
        tbody.innerHTML += '<tr><td>' + b + '</td><td>' + fmt(d.assets[i]) + '</td><td>' + fmt(d.liabilities[i]) + '</td><td class="' + valClass(gap) + '">' + fmt(gap) + '</td><td class="' + valClass(cum) + '">' + fmt(cum) + '</td></tr>';
      });
    }

    updateChart('All');
    updateTable('All');
  })();
  </script>

  {% else %}
  <div style="text-align: center; padding: 60px; color: var(--text-secondary);">
    <p>No repricing gap data available.</p>
    <p style="font-size: 0.85rem;">Deal-level data with maturity dates is required.</p>
  </div>
  {% endif %}
</div>

  (function() {
    const data = {{ scenario_studio | tojson_safe }};

    if (typeof Chart !== 'undefined' && data.combined && data.combined.length) {
      const labels = data.combined.map(c => c.scenario);
      const datasets = [
        {
          label: 'ΔNII',
          data: data.combined.map(c => c.delta_nii),
          backgroundColor: data.combined.map(c => c.delta_nii >= 0 ? 'rgba(63,185,80,0.7)' : 'rgba(248,81,73,0.7)'),
          borderColor: data.combined.map(c => c.delta_nii >= 0 ? '#3fb950' : '#f85149'),
          borderWidth: 1,
        }
      ];
      if (data.has_eve) {
        datasets.push({
          label: 'ΔEVE',
          data: data.combined.map(c => c.delta_eve),
          backgroundColor: 'rgba(88,166,255,0.5)',
          borderColor: '#58a6ff',
          borderWidth: 1,
        });
      }
      new Chart(document.getElementById('chart-scenario-combined'), {
        type: 'bar',
        data: { labels: labels, datasets: datasets },
        options: {
          responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
          plugins: {
            legend: { labels: { color: '#e6edf3' } },
            title: { display: false }
          },
          scales: {
            x: { ticks: { color: '#8b949e', font: { size: 10 } }, grid: { color: '#21262d' } },
            y: { ticks: { color: '#8b949e', callback: function(v) { return v.toLocaleString(); } }, grid: { color: '#21262d' } }
          }
        }
      });
    }
  })();
  </script>
